features: Freshmatic refill for Air Wick auto spray gadgets
Bursts of fragrance to constantly freshen your home with 24/7 odour stop technology
Up to 70 days of continuous fragrance per refill at a minimum setting
No wet spray so you can enjoy more fragrance in the air and less on the floor
description: Product Description Air Wick Pure Freshmatic Max Auto Sprays release bursts of continuous fresh fragrance so your home always smells welcoming. Just set the air freshener to your preferred fragrance intensity setting and enjoy while the Pink Sweet Pea refill fragrances your home. With its improved formula with no added water, Air Wick Pure neutralises odours with no water fall down and diffuses a fresh a pleasant fragrance in your home. Enhance your home with the fresh scent of Pink Sweet Pea. Manufacturer Contact Information Wellcroft House Wellcroft Road Slough Sl1 4Aq
